name: World Legacy Key
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>遺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>へ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>至</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いた</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>る<ruby lang="jp"><rb>鍵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is activated: You can target 1 of your banished "Mekk-Knight" monsters or "World Legacy" cards; add it to your hand. Negate any opponent's Trap effect that activates in the same column as a "Mekk-Knight" monster you control.
eff: When this card is activated: You can target 1 of your banished "Mekk-Knight" monsters or "World Legacy" cards; add it to your hand. Negate any opponent's Trap effect that activates in the same column as a "Mekk-Knight" monster you control.

action: Adds banished cards to the hand
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
